legacyGeoPassport.priorFindings: KZ absent from mexc.com/terms prohibited list (terms updated 2025-05-29), BUT AFSA warning of 2026-04-29 names MEXC as unlicensed toward Kazakhstan citizens. Availability CONFLICTED; OWNER_REVIEW_REQUIRED.

production.confidence: partial (refers to terms capture, not a KZ availability confirmation)

masterQueueItem.completionCriteria: The AFSA-warning-vs-terms conflict is resolved with a decisive higher-tier official source, or explicitly retained as CONFLICTING with tiered dated provenance; owner review completed.

repositoryInventory.note: Production and legacy data are IMPLEMENTATION truth only, not verified research truth. Repository routes/codes are implementation facts, not eligibility evidence.

researchPriorityDecision.ownerAction: additional tiered dated official-source research to resolve or explicitly retain CONFLICTING
researchPriorityDecision.rationale: MEXC availability for Kazakhstan is CONFLICTING: KZ is absent from MEXC's own prohibited-jurisdictions terms (partial positive signal) while the AFSA regulator warning of 2026-04-29 names MEXC as unlicensed toward Kazakhstan citizens (Tier-A regulator). Per MI Brain source hierarchy, a regulator/sanctions source outranks exchange terms; the conflict must be resolved with a decisive higher-tier dated official source or explicitly retained. Do NOT resolve in this queue task.

knownFactsFromRepositoryOnly: Kazakhstan is absent from MEXC's official prohibited-jurisdictions list (mexc.com/terms, capture 2026-07-03; terms updated 2025-05-29) — a partial positive signal, NOT a confirmation.
The AIFC regulator (AFSA) publicly listed MEXC among unlicensed digital-asset platforms toward Kazakhstan citizens (warning of 2026-04-29).
No dedicated Kazakhstan support page, KZT currency page, or AFSA/AIFC license for MEXC was found in prior repository research.
Legacy GEO passport research_status = not_started; all availability/product fields UNKNOWN; legal entity null.
Production geoRankings marks MEXC availability=unknown, bonusAvailability=unknown, confidence=partial, with a regulator caution note; KZ page is publication-blocked.
An affiliate route (/go/mexc) and code (mexc-CryptoBonus) exist as implementation facts only; geo_eligible UNKNOWN; bonus not_checked.
No MEXC canonical MI package, staging pipeline, or MIGRATION_5 preview exists.

repositoryOnlyConflicts.issue: MEXC's own terms do not prohibit Kazakhstan, but the AFSA regulator warning (2026-04-29) names MEXC as unlicensed toward Kazakhstan citizens.
repositoryOnlyConflicts.tierComparison: Regulator/sanctions (Tier A) vs exchange terms (Tier A) — recency and authority must be weighed with dated sources.

unknownsAndEvidenceGaps: Legal entity and domain routing serving Kazakhstan (mexc.com vs any local entity/notice).
Registration eligibility for Kazakhstan citizens / residents / foreign nationals resident in KZ; new-registration acceptance; minimum age; excluded segments.
KYC support, accepted Kazakhstan documents, proof-of-address, citizenship-vs-residence handling.
Per-product availability: spot, derivatives, margin, copy trading, earn/staking, P2P, KZT P2P, direct KZT deposit, direct KZT withdrawal, bank-card purchase, mobile app, other KZ-relevant products.
KZT fiat: official P2P KZT support, listed payment methods, direct KZT deposit/withdrawal rails, Kazakhstan-issued card support, provider/entity/jurisdiction restrictions.

Regulation: any MEXC local authorization/claim for Kazakhstan; supported vs restricted vs prohibited; which restricted-jurisdiction lists apply; product-specific restrictions; sanctions/residency/regional exclusions.

Referral/affiliate: official referral-code entry flow; Kazakhstan compatibility of the global code; local KZ referral program; owning entity; registration-time entry requirement; existing-user exclusions.

Promotions/bonus: KZ-specific official promotions; any KZ-verified amount; whether global maximums apply locally; KYC/deposit/volume/date/segment conditions; separation of referral rewards vs campaign prize pools.
Whether the AFSA-warning-vs-terms conflict resolves with a decisive higher-tier dated source or must be retained as CONFLICTING.

researchLanguages: Kazakh (when an official Kazakhstan-local source exists)
prohibitedMethods: unofficial bonus aggregators as decision sources
researchMode.thirdPartyRule: Third-party sources may be used only for discovery or contradiction context; they must never override current official evidence.

A_legalEntityAndDomainRouting: Which domain and application route serve Kazakhstan?
Are there Kazakhstan-specific entities, notices or terms?
Are trading, fiat, cards, referral and promotions served by the same entity?
B_registrationEligibility: Can a foreign national resident in Kazakhstan register?
Are any territories or user segments excluded?
C_kyc: Are citizenship and residence treated differently?
Which products and limits require KYC?
researchQuestions.D_rule: Do not flatten product statuses into one overall answer.
E_fiatAndKzt: Is KZT officially supported in P2P?
Which payment methods are officially listed?
Does an official direct KZT deposit rail exist?
Does an official direct KZT withdrawal rail exist?
F_regulationAndRestrictions: Is MEXC licensed/locally authorized in Kazakhstan?
Does MEXC make an official Kazakhstan regulatory claim?
Is Kazakhstan supported, restricted or prohibited?
Are derivatives or particular products restricted separately?
Are sanctions, residency or regional exclusions documented?
researchQuestions.F_rule: Do not infer local authorization from availability.
G_referralAndAffiliate: Does an official referral-code entry flow exist?
Is the project route or code compatible with Kazakhstan?
Is global referral-code compatibility officially verified for Kazakhstan?
Is there a local Kazakhstan referral program?
Which entity owns the referral relationship?
Must the code be entered during registration?
researchQuestions.G_rule: Repository routes and codes are implementation facts only, not eligibility evidence.
H_promotionsAndBonus: Are current official promotions specifically open to Kazakhstan?
Is any bonus amount verified for Kazakhstan?
Are referral rewards and campaign prize pools separate programs?

claimModel.rule: No claim may be confirmed solely because it appears in legacy or production data.

tierC: official social announcements with clear terms
tierD: third-party context only; never sufficient alone for availability, ranking, CTA or promo

expectedDeepResearchOutputContract.deepResearchAuthorizes: research only — NOT import, production, ranking, CTA, promo, publication or MIGRATION_5
